name: REvil
description: REvil, also known as Sodinokibi, is a major ransomware-as-a-service group that emerged in 2019 and became one of the most well-known double extortion ransomware operations globally. The group is known for combining enterprise-wide encryption with theft of sensitive data and public leak threats to ma
strategic_objectives: Data theft to increase ransom leverage
Large-scale victim acquisition through affiliates and supply
